title: Assistant Store Manager - Landmark Books - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Landmark Books - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Landmark Books in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Landmark Books:
Landmark Books is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Books!
